#### \
Authors: *Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj*\

## echoAI: API access to variant-level AI/ML predictions including IMPACT (immune cell TF binding), SpliceAI (splice site predictions), and deep learning annotations (Basenji, DeepSEA). Part of the echoverse suite for genomic fine-mapping.

This R package is part of the *echoverse* suite that supports
[`echolocatoR`](https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR): an automated
genomic fine-mapping pipeline.

If you use echoAI, please cite:

> Brian M. Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021) echolocatoR: an
> automated end-to-end statistical and functional genomic fine-mapping
> pipeline, *Bioinformatics*; btab658,
> <https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658>

## Installation

``` r

if(!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("RajLabMSSM/echoAI")
library(echoAI)
```

## Functions

### Query & annotation

- [`IMPACT_query()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_query.md)
  : Query IMPACT annotations and LD-scores from tabix-indexed files on
  Zenodo. Supports wide, long, and list output formats.
- [`IMPACT_get_annotations()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_get_annotations.md)
  : Download raw IMPACT annotation matrices from GitHub and merge with
  your variant data.
- [`IMPACT_get_annotation_key()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_get_annotation_key.md)
  : Retrieve the IMPACT annotation key describing tissue, cell type, and
  transcription factor metadata for all 707 annotations.

### Enrichment

- [`IMPACT_compute_enrichment()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_compute_enrichment.md)
  : Compute enrichment of IMPACT scores across SNP groups (lead GWAS,
  credible sets, consensus).
- [`IMPACT_iterate_enrichment()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_iterate_enrichment.md)
  : Run enrichment tests across all loci.

### Visualisation

- [`IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot.md)
  : Box/violin plot of IMPACT scores by SNP group with statistical
  comparisons.
- [`IMPACT_plot_enrichment()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_plot_enrichment.md)
  : Bar and violin plots summarising enrichment results.
- [`IMPACT_plot_impact_score()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_plot_impact_score.md)
  : Multi-panel locus plot combining GWAS, fine-mapping, and per-tissue
  IMPACT scores.
- [`IMPACT_heatmap()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_heatmap.md)
  : ComplexHeatmap of mean IMPACT scores across loci and SNP groups.

## Documentation

# Package index

## IMPACT annotations

Query and process IMPACT transcription factor binding predictions

- [`IMPACT_query()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_query.md)
  : Query IMPACT annotations

- [`IMPACT_get_annotations()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_get_annotations.md)
  :

  Download *IMPACT* annotations

- [`IMPACT_iterate_get_annotations()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_iterate_get_annotations.md)
  :

  Gather all *IMPACT* annotations that overlap with your query

- [`IMPACT_get_annotation_key()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_get_annotation_key.md)
  :

  Get *IMPACT* annotation key

- [`IMPACT_get_ldscores()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_get_ldscores.md)
  : Download LD scores from IMPACT publication

- [`IMPACT_get_top_annotations()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_get_top_annotations.md)
  : Get the top annotation(s)

- [`IMPACT_postprocess_annotations()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_postprocess_annotations.md)
  :

  Prepare *IMPACT* annotations

## IMPACT enrichment

Compute and visualise enrichment of IMPACT scores across SNP groups

- [`IMPACT_compute_enrichment()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_compute_enrichment.md)
  : Compute enrichment of IMPACT scores
- [`IMPACT_iterate_enrichment()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_iterate_enrichment.md)
  : Iterate IMPACT enrichment tests

## IMPACT visualisation

Plots for IMPACT scores and enrichment results

- [`IMPACT_plot_enrichment()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_plot_enrichment.md)
  : Plot IMPACT score enrichment

- [`IMPACT_plot_impact_score()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_plot_impact_score.md)
  : Locus plot of IMPACT scores

- [`IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot.md)
  :

  *IMPACT* SNP group box plot

- [`IMPACT_heatmap()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_heatmap.md)
  :

  Plot ComplexHeatmap of *IMPACT* scores

## SpliceAI

Query and visualise SpliceAI splice-site predictions

- [`SPLICEAI_run()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/SPLICEAI_run.md)
  :

  Run pre-trained *SpliceAI* model

- [`SPLICEAI_query_api()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/SPLICEAI_query_api.md)
  : Query SpliceAI Lookup API

- [`SPLICEAI_query_tsv()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/SPLICEAI_query_tsv.md)
  :

  Query genome-wide *SpliceAI* results (TSV format)

- [`SPLICEAI_query_tsv_iterate()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/SPLICEAI_query_tsv_iterate.md)
  :

  Iterate *SpliceAI* TSV queries across multiple loci

- [`SPLICEAI_query_vcf()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/SPLICEAI_query_vcf.md)
  :

  Query genome-wide *SpliceAI* results (VCF format)

- [`SPLICEAI_snp_probs()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/SPLICEAI_snp_probs.md)
  :

  Postprocess *SpliceAI* results

- [`SPLICEAI_plot()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/SPLICEAI_plot.md)
  :

  Plot *SpliceAI* predictions

## Deep learning annotations

Query and visualise Basenji/DeepSEA predictions

- [`DEEPLEARNING_query()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/DEEPLEARNING_query.md)
  : Iteratively collect deep learning annotations
- [`DEEPLEARNING_query_multi_chr()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/DEEPLEARNING_query_multi_chr.md)
  : Query deep learning annotations and LD scores (multiple chromosomes)
- [`DEEPLEARNING_query_one_chr()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/DEEPLEARNING_query_one_chr.md)
  : Query deep learning annotations and LD scores (single chromosome)
- [`DEEPLEARNING_melt()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/DEEPLEARNING_melt.md)
  : Melt deep learning annotations into long format
- [`DEEPLEARNING_plot()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/DEEPLEARNING_plot.md)
  : Plot deep learning predictions

## Bundled data

- [`IMPACT_files`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echoAI/reference/IMPACT_files.md)
  : IMPACT files
